name: Salsa Di Pomodoro- Basic Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 cans Plum tomatoes, peeled (28 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pot. Sauté for 5 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in the basil, nutmeg, sugar, salt, and pepper.
4. Open the four cans of plum tomatoes and discard any pits or damaged pieces.
5. Pour the crushed tomatoes into the pot with the tomato paste, red wine, and butter.
6. Simmer the sauce over low heat for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Check the seasoning as needed before serving.
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :30
